threat: CVE-2026-32119 - OpenEMR has Stored DOM XSS via SearchHighli
content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-32119 - OpenEMR has Stored DOM XSS via SearchHighli
iptables -A INPUT -s 8.0.0.2 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 8.0.0.2 -j DROP
